articles.title: Pentagon’s ‘Immaculate Constellation’ Allegations Ignite New UFO Disclosure Firestorm In Congress
articles.summary: Whistleblower allegations introduced in a November 2024 House Oversight hearing claim that a hidden AI‑driven program called “Immaculate Constellation” collects and conceals UAP data within classified military servers, scrubbing anomalous images from global surveillance feeds before they reach broader intelligence analysts. The program is alleged to be an unacknowledged Special Access Program that operates outside normal congressional oversight, potentially bypassing even portions of Congress.

en.title: Pentagon’s ‘Immaculate Constellation’ Allegations Ignite New UFO Disclosure Firestorm In Congress
en.summary: Whistleblower allegations introduced in a November 2024 House Oversight hearing claim that a hidden AI‑driven program called “Immaculate Constellation” collects and conceals UAP data within classified military servers, scrubbing anomalous images from global surveillance feeds before they reach broader intelligence analysts. The program is alleged to be an unacknowledged Special Access Program that operates outside normal congressional oversight, potentially bypassing even portions of Congress.

de.title: Die Anschuldigungen des Pentagons wegen der „Unbefleckten Konstellation“ entfachen im Kongress einen neuen Feuersturm zur Enthüllung von UFOs
de.summary: Whistleblower-Vorwürfe, die in einer Anhörung im Repräsentantenhaus im November 2024 erhoben wurden, behaupten, dass ein verstecktes KI-gesteuertes Programm namens „Immaculate Constellation“ UAP-Daten auf geheimen Militärservern sammelt und verbirgt und so anomale Bilder aus globalen Überwachungs-Feeds bereinigt, bevor sie breitere Geheimdienstanalysten erreichen. Es wird behauptet, dass es sich bei dem Programm um ein nicht anerkanntes Sonderzugangsprogramm handelt, das außerhalb der normalen Kontrolle des Kongresses operiert und möglicherweise sogar Teile des Kongresses umgeht.

articles.title: How to watch 'Sleeping Dog' online – stream controversial UAP/UFO doc from anywhere
articles.summary: Journalist and filmmaker Jeremy Corbell discusses his new documentary with NBC News correspondent Gadi Schwartz. The documentary is titled “Sleeping Dog.” It explores Corbell’s navigation of government secrecy. It also covers whistleblowers and his search for truth about UFOs.

en.summary: Journalist and filmmaker Jeremy Corbell discusses his new documentary with NBC News correspondent Gadi Schwartz. The documentary is titled “Sleeping Dog.” It explores Corbell’s navigation of government secrecy. It also covers whistleblowers and his search for truth about UFOs.

de.title: So schauen Sie sich „Sleeping Dog“ online an – streamen Sie die umstrittene UAP/UFO-Dokumentation von überall aus
de.summary: Der Journalist und Filmemacher Jeremy Corbell bespricht seinen neuen Dokumentarfilm mit NBC News-Korrespondent Gadi Schwartz. Der Dokumentarfilm trägt den Titel „Sleeping Dog“. Es untersucht Corbells Umgang mit Regierungsgeheimnissen. Es geht auch um Whistleblower und seine Suche nach der Wahrheit über UFOs.

summaries.pentagon-s-immaculate-constellation-alle: Whistleblower allegations introduced in a November 2024 House Oversight hearing claim that a hidden AI‑driven program called “Immaculate Constellation” collects and conceals UAP data within classified military servers, scrubbing anomalous images from global surveillance feeds before they reach broader intelligence analysts. The program is alleged to be an unacknowledged Special Access Program that operates outside normal congressional oversight, potentially bypassing even portions of Congress. Pentagon spokesperson Sue Gough and former AARO director Sean Kirkpatrick have denied the program’s existence, but members of both parties in Congress are demanding greater transparency into UAP investigations, defense spending, and compartmentalized aerospace programs. Specific claims tied to the alleged archive include encounters with objects exhibiting extraordinary maneuverability and unknown propulsion, such as military aircraft boxed by spheres and a glowing object near a Navy carrier group, though no independent verification or publicly released evidence has been provided. If the allegations are accurate, the dispute could shift from UFOs to a constitutional challenge over classified national‑security programs operating outside authorized oversight, potentially triggering audits, inspector‑general probes, and criminal investigations.
summaries.no-smoking-gun-in-new-az-ufo-report-it-s: Whistleblower allegations introduced in a November 2024 House Oversight hearing claim that a hidden AI‑driven program called “Immaculate Constellation” collects and conceals UAP data within classified military servers, scrubbing anomalous images from global surveillance feeds before they reach broader intelligence analysts. The program is alleged to be an unacknowledged Special Access Program that operates outside normal congressional oversight, potentially bypassing even portions of Congress. Pentagon spokesperson Sue Gough and former AARO director Sean Kirkpatrick have denied the program’s existence, but members of both parties in Congress are demanding greater transparency into UAP investigations, defense spending, and compartmentalized aerospace programs. Specific claims tied to the alleged archive include encounters with objects exhibiting extraordinary maneuverability and unknown propulsion, such as military aircraft boxed by spheres and a glowing object near a Navy carrier group, though no independent verification or publicly released evidence has been provided. If the allegations are accurate, the dispute could shift from UFOs to a constitutional challenge over classified national‑security programs operating outside authorized oversight, potentially triggering audits, inspector‑general probes, and criminal investigations.
summaries.film-how-to-watch-sleeping-dog-online-st: Journalist and filmmaker Jeremy Corbell discusses his new documentary with NBC News correspondent Gadi Schwartz. The documentary is titled “Sleeping Dog.” It explores Corbell’s navigation of government secrecy. It also covers whistleblowers and his search for truth about UFOs.
